name: self-refuting-rag
description: SR-RAG: a multi-agent question answering system with claim-level adversarial verification.

scripts.start: node scripts/stop-ports.js && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.start:logs: node scripts/stop-ports.js && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run backend:dev:log" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.test: echo "Run: python -m pytest tests/ (activate srenv first)"
